provenance: DLR Urban Traffic dataset v1.3.1 (AIM Research Intersection, Braunschweig): infrastructure-sensor trajectory replay
artifact_rules_justification: results/TRIAGE_v0.3.0.md — tracking-pipeline discontinuities: track re-association makes the replayed speed step instantaneously (verified: entity 1695556999843816, v69->v70, 11.4 -> 18.4 m/s within one 0.05 s sample = ~140 m/s^2), which the friction-circle rule correctly reports as impossible. A true defect of the dataset's tracking, not a tool mistake.
